creator: oggy@farscape.co.uk
text:
Building gcc9 on 13-CURRENT on powerpc64 - PowerMac G5 Quad (11,2), fails with:

/usr/local/bin/ld: build/gengtype-state.o: in function `state_writer::write_state_a_string(char const*)':
gengtype-state.c:(.text+0x2dc0): undefined reference to `fputc_unlocked'
collect2: error: ld returned 1 exit status
gmake[5]: *** [Makefile:2865: build/gengtype] Error 1
gmake[5]: *** Waiting for unfinished jobs....
gmake[4]: *** [Makefile:4704: all-stage2-gcc] Error 2
gmake[3]: *** [Makefile:22591: stage2-bubble] Error 2
gmake[2]: *** [Makefile:22806: bootstrap-lean] Error 2
